title: mimulus constrictus
intro: Mimulus constrictus is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae, commonly known as the small-seeded monkey flower. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety and stress due to its adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Mimulus constrictus include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress-related disorders. Herbal preparations of Mimulus constrictus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed as a natural way to alleviate stress and anxiety.
